name: q4_2025_menshikov_baseline
description: Baseline review — Q4 2025 MENSHIKOV LLC. Must match $795.16 (the known CDTFA backtest) and surface KY+VA surcharge handling + Oregon WMT. This is a CLEAN backtest return (no anomalies), so the agent correctly routes the surcharge/WMT items to filing_reminders + next_steps — not to 'issues'. We therefore assert on filing_reminders/next_steps, NOT min_issues (a clean return having zero blocking issues is correct, not a failure).
